reviews.review_description:
So I have a couple things to say about this game so I’m going to put it in a couple sections

1. Damage / Death:

Everyone has felt the horrible feeling when you get hit in the wing once by a gun and now your engine is on fire. This is a long awaited feature that is constantly asked for by the community (at least as far as I’ve read in the reviews) PLEASE add accrual hotboxes and damage. Besides damage mechanics let’s talk about death. We all know when we’re about to run into a mountain and there is no hope for survival. If you play vtol vr you’d probably be reaching down for the ejection handles. To my surprise every time I play this game I always wish I could just give some realism to the fight I’m in by ejecting. Also on the contrary we the community would love to be able to have at least minimal control of the aircraft after engine failure to try and take someone down with you. These asks would be loved among the community and add wonderful realism to this game.

2. Armament / Rearming:

PLEASE almost every single review asks for some way to land / take off before and during fights. This does not have to be a feature that is always in every fight but rather another selection similar to zones currently are. As for armament the community as well as me have been asking and begging for more missiles and weapon options. This section would definitely supply the community with a lot more options to fights and add realism and more fun to playing the game.

3. Aircraft:

This is a rather short but well asked for section. I believe that all players are tired of the few options of 3 aircraft to choose from. This section is more for the community than me as that I still enjoy the options supplied by the three aircraft to currently choose from. Also after playing this game for a while a lobby I played with decided to start a game of hide and seek. While I don’t want to explain all the rules here it would be interesting to see how I could be formed into a very fun and interesting game mode.

4. Gamemodes:

While a more unspoken but definitely would still be a much enjoyed feature. As most people who have played vtol vr probably know solo mission are incredibly fun. While this suggestion is rather unvoiced currently I would supply a good reason for more players to buy and play this game.

5. ETC / Other:

Most players that I have played with and voiced my suggestions on this topic have agreed with me on having these features in the game. Some of these suggestion would include adding HMCS from other games like DCS or War Thunder. Maybe consider adding something like the night vision in vtol vr into this game. It could be nice when playing in night time and could be able to be toggled in the main lobby by the creator of the lobby.

Conclusion:

While this game is already incredibly immersive and fun to play I believe as all games are, could be improved as the community sees fit and could sway from what the Devs want to give the community some wanted features. Thank you for taking the time to read this incredibly long review. I promise my other reviews are not this long! I just have a lot of opinions for the possible direction of this game!

This game is the definition of amazing. I dont have a pc powerful enough to run vtol so i found this game from the same devs and its really nice. I played it for a while and i can say that its really good, i know that the bots may be hard to fight but its okay. I really hope devs make an airbase like in vtol or add missions, i have really high hopes for this game

The game feels amazing and is the most fun standalone flight sim i’ve played, the only thing I could think to add immediately would be air-to-ground missions for replay-ability, i get this is a hard process but mission types in general would make the game so much more unique besides just PVP

I’ve been playing the game now for a couple days and since you can either play PVP against real people or AI why not do a co-op mode where you do missions against the AI and ground units.

I don’t know if there is a discord to request things but my requests would be more aircraft like the A10 or harrier etc because as of now there only the F-15,16 and 18

Wrapping thus review up great game excited to see how it evolves in the future 5 stars

reviews.review_title: Really good but I want swedish plens
reviews.review_description: Hi I really like the game but got sad when I saw no gripen or landing gears on the planes. I was hoping that maybe there would be a game mode where you have two airbases on the large maps that you take off from and go bomb the other one and one for free flight so you can land planes as that's one thing that is cool about planes

The game is really fun for a quick dogfight but if you’re looking for a more realistic fighter combat sim this is not it, the planes are incredibly arcade-ey, cartoony and unrealistic, thrust ratios and speeds are not modeled very well at all. All the aircraft feel like you slapped an rc engine on a tank and tried to fly it through the air, very unresponsive and underpowered. Was hoping there was finally a decent on the go flight experience but I’ll just stick with PC vr sims that focus on realism.

reviews.review_title: Don’t listen to the bad reviews.
reviews.review_description: Look, I understand there are things to be fixed. But what I have noticed in the 1 star review section is issues with flaring not working against missles. But, ITS SIMPLE. All you literally have to do is cut engine power and spam flares and fly in multiple directions away from the point you shot your first flare. THATS IT. 😔

reviews.review_title: Devs read till the end MORE MISSILS
reviews.review_description: Nothing else comes close to comparing. Although it is strictly dogfighting and free flight it is STILL soooo fun. I find myself constantly spending hours getting lost in the cockpit and the amazing flight mechanics. The devs luckily have not given up on it for no reason unlike most of the dev for vr games now, they are still adding new maps, updates and i HOPE new planes the only complainti have its the lack of plane selection only having f 15 f 16 and f18 plus only generic missiles. Please devs and more selection.

reviews.review_title: Not being able to play online
reviews.review_description: The amount of times ive played this game it has never showed me that the meta authentication failing and not being able to play online. When i start the game it shows a lot of words and it doesnt even let me load into free flight even after i uninstalled and restarted my headset. PLEASE HELP ME FIX THIS I LOVE THIS GAME TOO MUCH

Listen this game could be something but right now its a$s. You only get to choose between F-15, F-16, or F-18. And let me tell you this game simulates what would not happen in a dogfight. Why is it when someone else’s missiles just basically have a AIM-120 on steroids but when I have missiles its the exact equivalent to having twins with down syndrome on my wings. Why is it that when someone shoots at me and barely hits me I die instantly but when I shoot at someone its the exact equivalent to having  22lr’s shooting out of my gun that disintegrate after traveling 10ft. Why is it when someone deploys 1 flare at full after burner ￼and does no kind of movement my missile misses them but when I deploy all my flares and do some Tom Cruise shi they’re missile still hits me? Like this game is straight bs right now. If your thinking about buying this game come back in a year and see then how it is

The game is really, and I mean REALLY, good... Standalone VTOL for the oculus, I really hope that in the next updates we will get more jets and missile variety, and if I'm being honest I pray that we get some ground missions like VTOL has

reviews.review_title: The Best Flight game only one problem
reviews.review_description: Everything from the maps to planes looks amazing however this could be even better if you were only ejected from the plane when you crash. I mean like if your engine is on fire make like a runway for repairs or let the player keep flying so they can just maybe pull an overshoot and take someone down with them. I feel like it would make battle more intense rather than aim for the engine then they're out. Also I know the wings already come off but I think the hotboxes are quite close so if your wing gets shot so does the engine and I would love the physics of flying with one wing.
I know this is a dogfight sim but it would be cool if we had a campaign or something like that, and if we had the f-14 and other jets!

I love this game I play it almost every day I have a few things that I think would make the game better first I would like it if you added ejection and made the handle actually work to where it makes it send you out of the plane second I would like it if you added take off and landings before a mission and add it as a game setting to where you can enable it before a pvp battle for the idea if you wanted to start flying for start in the ground  third I would like it if you added actual missions to complete either single player or multiplayer and lastly in PvP mode I would like it if you stayed with the plane after you get shot down and stay with the plane until you hit the ground then transfer you to spectator and also add more planes it’s getting boring using the same planes over and over again but that’s all I have
The developer will ban you. If you ask why he gives no reason. The discord is a massive group of trolls. Everyone is getting banned. It's a complete ban fest its honesty pathetic

I have absolutely no problem with this game I think it is amazing, being able to do cobra maneuvers is just the cherry on top this game is definitely worth the 15 bucks. All I am asking for is to PLEASE ADD A CREATOR CAM or some kind of recording software, but other than that this game is a 10/10 experience❤️

First of all, the flight model is good but the game missed so much potential. There is no possibility to land or even start the plane. Every session  are short (max 4vs4) with no possibility to change the difficulty (the bot are extremely hard). However, imagine an infinite offline mode where each time, you are called to patrol/control some random civil planes until you get surprised with a dogfight merge. At least it would include departure and landing. I just hope for some updates that propose this kind of content.
Good game but please add more jets and helicopters add this helicopter troop

So you have to read the title and take it extremely serious. 
This isn't a fun "game"in the traditional sense 
. This is a simulator type app that does not teach you well enough IMO. I could be wrong... they do show you some, But the bots are too hard.
It will show you maneuvers and it will maybe attempt to show you how to turn accurately or correctly.... But once you actually go to play the game it is literally just who can shoot the missile fastest... nothing like Dawn of Jets. 

But you know what it has that Dawn of Jets doesn't have? MISSILE LOCK! Super realistic too.

If you don't know how to do this in the first place you're not going to do well. maybe you can learn? maybe you have patience. I think it's boring AF when I can't really do anything and the fight's over super fast. The plane barely turns... I'm not calling this a game because It really is more like a straight-up simulator.

It is very well made and it seems to be pretty legit with the flying.
The dev's should add helicopters like the little bird and more jet should add the A-10 warthog or a f22 raptor's good game though
Add aim 120 for the bvr bc waiting for a aim 9 to miss is crazy when you add the aim 120 you need chaff
can you please add fortnite?

This game is excellent! As expected from the VTOL VR developers themself. However i wish there was an offline career mode and an online career mode, as well as the ability to takeoff/land. I also wish there was more of a variety of planes since there aer only 3. To be fair though, it is a new game. In future i feel like the f-14, su 27 and su 30 should be added. Overall great game. 8/10

Also update more pls u rarely update

This game is already great. It has amazing mechanics and not many issues. I think it would be nice to have some 5 gen fighters, but have an option to make it for just 4th or 5th Gen in a match. Also I think ejection seats and long range missiles would be cool, of course adding chaff too. Lastly I know it's a pvp dogfighting oriented game, but I think it would be fun for some pve somewhat large scale missions.

If your wanting instant dog fighting action is your favorite jets this is for you. I love the physics in this and how you need to use your power management properly to get the advantage on the enemy. Keep up the great work Devs looking forward to where this game can go!
If they added an a10 more buttons and taking off and landing I would play it everyday but there is only 3 jets and you are very limited to what you can do

Too many children screaming and cursing in online mode. Then the developers ban you!!  You spend your hard earned money just to not be able to play. Complete BS. If you join a group the discord will spew hate against you and your group.
Game has LOTS of bugs and glitches. Sometimes it’s unplayable.  The game is constantly updated but the updates make the he crashs and glitches even worse

I think the game is great. Don’t get me wrong, but I think there needs to be an free flight or also in normal combats when I’m trying to do something with a formation we should be able to go get fuel on the ground like landing strips. I think they should add maybe two landing strips for each team that are big enough and so we can get fuel land and that’s all I think that would be great that’s my only problem.

Your game is absolutely amazing. I’ve been waiting for a good dogfighting game for a long long time now, and i absolutely love it. It was a bit of a learning curve but I got the hang of it and dominate in PvP lobbies. But I would like to see more aircraft in the future. Maybe things like: a mig 29, su33, or maybe an f22. And don’t listen to the people who say the bots are hard they are easy as hell once you learn the game. Thank you

Its an okay game but theres definitely not enough content for 15 dollars, and theres no tutorial, it just throws you in. The joystick is also too sensitive so its very hard to actually control the jet so i would very much like to see the aircraft joystick toned down or at least a preference setting to control the sensitivity myself. Also there should be a start up and take off mechanic and landing part because.
 right now it’s just very stale for a game that has very good potential. Also please add windows so i can see better, its so annoying in these games when they dont have windows so you can see behind yourself.

developer_response.body: There are tutorials in the Academy section of the main menu.  You can lower the joystick sensitivity in the game settings menu. Since the game is focused on quick engagements, short battles, and the art of dogfighting, start up and take-off doesn't fit the theme. Thanks for your review.

reviews.review_description:
Iv been waiting for a game like this on quest for about 3 years and it’s finally here. First I’m going to give my pros and cons, the cons not necessarily bad things just things that need to be refined.

Pros-

Probably the most realistic flight sim on stand alone

Easy to learn hard to master

Interactive lobbies 

Has a really awsome hologram that you can see after the round that shows you what you and everyone else did at the end of the game 

10/10 sound effects ranging from you rwr, the missile screaming, you can here the bullets fly past your canopy and everything looks and feels so crisp 

You can coustomize the game to make it guns only, missiles only, infinite ammo  ect

There’s a bot only mode to practice your aim and maneuverability

 You can pull cobras and other special maneuvers

Each plane has it’s own pros and cons 


Now I will move onto the cons, I’m well aware this game was released extremely recently so a lot of these may change

Iv noticed that the planes really do not like to turn fight, I don’t know if it’s me but whenever I get into a turn fight I am always fighting to prevent a stall, irl jets can turn quite a bit without loosing a detrimental amount of speed

Lack of aircraft (this will most likely change) currently we only have 3 Aircraft including the F18, F15, and F16, it would be cool if moving forward that certain aircraft were usable from specific sides, for example, russian jets would fight American jets and there wouldn’t be any mixing of the two countries

radar warning and Flaring constancy, again could be a me issue, seem to be a little inconsistent, it’s definitely not a game breaker but something that I feel could be looked into just incase

Some crashing issues that really need fixed, which includes throwin everyone back to the lobby, or sometimes the game will abruptly end even if not everyone has died

Closing -

Current rating 8/10

Do I recommend? Without a doubt, everyone seems to be very friendly and helpful and if you want a good flying game this is your best option, yes there’s some issues but those can be easily fixed 

Can’t wait to see what this game becomes

reviews.review_title: Good Game but a few things missing.
reviews.review_description: Great game, really. However, I think there are a few things that should be added. I have seen a lot of people wanting landing and takeoff mechanics and what I would really appreciate would be a two player plane. Another thing is that there needs to be more interactive buttons in the planes and also we should get some missions like "Destroy the enemy base" etc. But overall a great game.

I have always wanted a game similar to VTOL vr, but the only thing that is missing is missions. Thing like taking out enemy bases while avoiding AA and stealth operations would be a great option. I love the multiplayer dogfighting which is very accurate in my opinion. After a while it can get kinda bland but that is just me I’m just saying I think this could attract a lot more attention than just dogfighting.

reviews.review_title: A great flight simulator for Quest
reviews.review_description:
Great flight sim indeed. One of the best I have in my library 100%. The ai will push you to the limits but are beatable for sure. Multiplayer is on a whole level of its own too. Just gotta do some of that Pilot Stuff 🤙 You can fight up to 4V4 which is insanely fun. The feeling of being last alive and still winning is just 😎🤌🤌🤌. Totally on board for updates and dlc content.
P.s Flight models are pretty good however the F16,f18 need just a little more thrust please. I’ve been flying since my first lesson at 11 years old and I personally feel like they are just a little bit under powered. Thanks 🤘 
Yo dev, can we get like a free flight multiplayer lobby 🙏💯 just for formation flying, canyon runs ect

reviews.review_title: Great game but need a few things added
reviews.review_description: This game has so much potential but it needs a few features like be able to start your own jet. They need to add aircraft carriers and specifically mirrors to the cockpit Many people are tired of having to turn their neck to see what behind them while dog fighting please add mirrors and make more buttons for the cockpit and make it useful

I have vtol vr on my pc but this is great just to pick up and play with just the headset. Bots are tough at times but it’s extremely rewarding when you get the win and it forces you to learn. Looking forward to future updates.

I love this game so much!, the flight physics, and the overall gameplay is amazing but I have a issue with the black out screen when you die. Instead of an immediate death you should be able to still try to pilot the air craft until you of course crash and die, which would add to the fun of you actually try to save yourself with everything shutdown, (engines, displays, electronics, guns and etc) since the plane is completely wiped from everything but the steering I think it would be cool to try to still pilot the plane before you crash into the water or mountains or something.

The plans are incredibly slow this game could be so much more amazing if they bump the speed up at 700￼ knots I think it’s snail would be faster. The speed makes it so unrealistic and the fact that you blackout every four seconds just ruins the game you can’t even do it. Any cool tricks cause you just blacked out every four seconds. 
￼

I love the game a lot and it is one plane game on quest that has stood out to me, bot difficulty I think should be an option to change how hard it is as if you just start they are not easy but they teach you how to get better at dog fighting, I would like them to add few more planes to choose from like a two seater like an f14 or smth like that with the sweep wings that can be toggled
Over all great game
Love it gifted my friends it they play it everyday,  but it would be better if it had a campaign.
I love the game but kinda gets boring after awile bc they don't update as much
The game itself is amazing, theres nothing for me to complain about except for the fact that its such a low choice of jets to fly. I do wish there were more options

First off this game is amazing! I’ve been looking for a game like this for a long time. I don’t have too much to complain about the game, I just hope and wish that more jets will be added to the game (my favorite being the f-14), I also hope that the devs will add some missions to the game, like bomb the runway, or destroy the convoy. But anyways I really enjoy the game I recommend this for any fans of combat in the air.

Sincerely-thugtwinkie0311

Players:

It’s a little like vtol vr but just needs more stuff. ￼There should also be a variety of jets to choose from, not just 3. Also add new game modes instead of dogfighting, do something like an online minigame.

Ideas to make the game better:

I like the game but we need more things instead of a dogfight. 
 And more , also MORE MAPS!!

I don’t often leave reviews but WOW! I’m impressed! What a simple yet complex game! The physics are pretty realistic, the controls are simple and it’s loads of fun. It is tough at first but if a bit of effort is put in trying to get them hang of it, you’ll have a great time! Definitely worth 20$.

For the developer: I’d recommend having a bit more detailed instructions on using the Radar effectively. The basics of switching modes is useless if you don’t know what each mode does. Kinda figuring it out after trial and error. Besides that, you’ve created a fantastic game! I hope to see more aircraft options, maybe missions, and other cool features in the future!

Im German im writing this in english,
So First of all Great Game but there is room for improfement Because pve would be very Great and for beginners Like me a Tutorial would be Great and pve would be the Best for beginners and a difficulty changier for bots too and a beginners friendly Lobby bc its as of Right now very difficould

developer_response.body: There are tutorials and information on controls in the Academy section of the main menu. I aim to add difficulty options for the bots soon. Thank you for your review!

reviews.review_description: It is so refreshing to play a game that feels truly complete on day one. No bugs, no clunky menus—just pure, high-octane combat. The gameplay is incredibly fast and punchy; every strike has a weight to it that you can actually feel. The animations are fluid, the response time is instantaneous, and the overall flow of the maneuvers makes every match feel intense. If you're tired of "early access" feel and just want a rock-solid, lightning-fast fighter, this is the one.

Very 
good game but flares don't work . Or at least for me. For the enemy it sure does work a lot for time but I have tried to use the flares for 1 hour and not once I managed to make them work. No matter the angle or speed I even watched videos how it supposed to work but rockets just ignore all my flares and go straight to my plane. I played VTOL and there I can make them work. Here nothing
Every time I try to load it says retrieving player name and gets stuck please help

developer_response.body: There was a service outage on March 19th which has been resolved. Please try again.

reviews.review_description:
Great game, although it needs some upgrades. ￼
￼ I would love for them to add landings ground and carrier, make the cockpit out of glass, so see-through  you know what I mean. make the cockpit more realistic,  more  buttons and controls  that actually work. And finally an upgrade that would be really fun is to add an ejection seat in every aircraft. If you get hit pull it!  They would make the game funner  ￼ ￼￼￼￼￼￼￼maybe more dramatic.  But  honestly  I love  this  game!
￼

reviews.review_title: Best game on quest! But suggestions.
reviews.review_description: There needs to be a f35 or more aircrafts in general to the game so there is more variety like VTOL, also some co op missions and a simple take off system by just turning on the engines and increasing throttle, and then take off, and of course retract landing gear. (Hopefully they see this!)

It’s a fun game, don’t get me wrong, but some of the features don’t work, for example everytime I’m in either a bot match or an actual match my flares never work, I always press the button for flares but why never release or work, everything else works fine but please fix the flare issue

developer_response.body: The flares work, but you will need to lower your throttle in order for missiles to stop chasing your hot engine. By default, one flare dispenses per button press, but there is a knob on the left side of the cockpit to set rapid flare release rate. Hope that helps.

reviews.review_description: I bought this game on day 1, and I love it. I have a few requests though... 1 make some angles harder to detect than others, aka notching, and make a 3rd person like feature (if you save replay, and go to it, you will see a 3d camera, if you grab it and move it, the camera position will move, this acts as a video camera, on a menu behind it which should have what it sees (the actual match) there should be a record button, you can move the camera after you click record). Also, add migs, sus, and more fighters, such as the f-14, and the av-8. Also add ground strike, and bomber/drone defense missions. Also, add taking off/landing :)
I think you guys did a great job. I would like to see if you could add take offs and landongs on ground and carriers. With some more locations. And missions.

reviews.review_title: Great game but it needs more content!
reviews.review_description: Don’t get me wrong, whats currently in the game is really good and the game is super fun in general, but i feel as though its kinda lacking. Currently, theres 3 aircraft and only 1 type of missile, the aim-9. I hope we could potentially get russian planes such as the mig-29 or su-27, or even some early cold war era planes like the f-4 and mig-19/21. Also, the ranked system is kind of a joke. It’s begging for a matchmaking system, as I’ve gone up against top 100 players while only being ranked top 800, which is just flat out unfair. Overall though, for only being out for around a month, it is a very good game and I think that with the right amount of content (quality over quantity) it could become one of the most popular games on standalone.

reviews.review_title: Please add a tutorial or smth
reviews.review_description: This game really needs a tutorial like it just loads you in expecting you to know controls like please add tutorials i refuse to play this game till they do so

developer_response.body: There's information on controls, tutorials, and practice scenarios in the Academy section of the main menu.

reviews.review_description:
Don’t get me wrong the game is really fun and even after playing it after 7days the game is still really fun to play but there is just one problem.
There is not a lot in content in the game we only get 3 fighter jets f-16 f-15 and the f-18 I really hope in the future we get more jets and maybe landing strips kinda like war thunder.
And another problem is there is only one kind of missile maybe later down the line we will get radar guided missiles,  instead of only heat seeking ￼￼￼. But to end it off the game is really fun and it is most definitely worth the money

It’s great and realistic and fun it’s just that it lacks options for example: we need more maps and weather options.
We also need more plane choices. I would also like 2 seater jets so you and your friend can be in the same plane helping and working with each other. Also I would like a runway option to start the battle taking off form a runway would be sick.Overall it’s a great game but just needs some options and diversity.👍👍👍

This game is amazing! Those bad reviews make no sense because you not having a tutorial is great! I love that you need to learn how to work the planes. Also, there are some things that need to be added, like, a runway for damaged aircrafts to land on or take off of, and flaps. Only reason Im talking about flaps is because when the stick is in any position it doesnt pull back far enough, and flaps would also give more lift for when you are able to crash into the ground, or you need to go higher fast. Also people are saying, " OMG! This game doesnt seem like VTOL VR it's bad!" And I think that's stupid! To run this on quest is easy for it and allows it to run well. While VTOL VR is a PCVR GAME! It literally runs on you PC and it basically gets streamed to your vr. There isn't any reason to say this game is bad because it is based for DOGFIGHTING! NOT A FLIGHT SIM! So in the end, this is a great game, and I also think that the people trash talking the game should do research. Thank you for reading this. Bye.

reviews.review_title: AMAZING GAME! But could be better...
reviews.review_description: Ive recently got this and me and my cousin have been blasting the heck out of eachother and it is fun as hell however to make it that tiny bit better there should be multiplayer free flight a fre more maps with airports and runways and a wider variety of planes/jets other than that it is a 100% BUY!

reviews.review_title: Best dogfighting sim so far, but
reviews.review_description:
Want to love this, but it’s missing too much for the asking price. Hope they bring the fake Apache as dlc and open up the maps and functions to be more like VTOL in the future. Seems more like a mobile game you’d play for 10 minute sessions. 

I thought gunship 4 would be out by now, and that seems abandoned. It would be amazing if this becomes the Mil-flight sim we’ve all been hoping for.

You guys should add a landing update and y’all should make a mission so people and have more fun and if you guys can make the one that is one steam if you guys can make like that I did not spend 10 bucks for a game that you can only do one thing in.

reviews.review_title: Really fun low entry barrier flightsim
reviews.review_description:
I've played flight sims for 20 years. The major downside to flight simulation is pc hardware requirements and flight control components create a high paywall to entry along with the hardware upgrade lifecycle where your $6000 pc is only viable for 3-4 years before you're buying new components. VFM is accessable and an enjoyable experience with a $250 vr headset/hand controllers.

VFM is great fun because its physics and flight characteristics are realistic while being simplified and easier to understand. The dogfight niche is very fun way to learn about the fundamentals critical to high performance flying.

I think Boundless Dynamics making the scope of this sim very narrowly focused on the WVR arena is great. The narrow specialized focus keeps the sim light and performance high even on entry level hardware. I like all the components of VFM as of December 26, 2025. 

As a F-14 Tomcat fan, I'd love to see a fair honest T-14D Sabercat with a digital fly by wire flight control system represented as the best performing/highest performing most capable version of itself added to VFM. Few things that I've felt have ever felt more right than being able to fly the F-14 with the performance capabilities enabling wins in guns dogfights versus everything flown by everyone. 

Consider adding a delta wing fighter comparable to a Mirage 2000. Consider adding a canard delta wing fighter comparable to a Gripen or Rafale. Consider adding a fighter comparable to Mig-29. Consider adding fighter comparable to Su-27. Consider adding a lower thrust fighter modeled on an advanced jet trainer aircraft. Consider adding a turboprop modeled on a primary flight training aircraft.

I don't know how much heavier VFM would be with variations of HUD symbology. The planes the T-15 and T-18 are modeled on each have their own unique lead computing optical sight and radar adjusted gunsight symbology.

I'm not sure if crossplay enabled anticheat is possible for pc and meta quest. In my opinion VFM would greatly benefit from an anticheat system that is challenging to circumvent/bypass for multiplayer, especially specfically ranked multiplayer.

In my opinion ranked 2v2 guns only, ranked 4v4 guns only, ranked 2v2 guns/fox 2's and ranked 4v4 guns/fox 2's pvp multiplayer divisions would be good additions. 

In my opinion a 1v1, 2v2, 3v3, 4v4 multiplayer mode that still uses matchmaking and keeps a tally of pilot flight hours win/loss/draw but doesnt rank players and occupys unoccupied player slots with bots would be a good addition.

It's honestly an 11/10, hard at first but really easy to understand and know how things work. Peak flight mechanics, pretty good graphics all around, although there aren't as many planes there's still a plane that you'd like. And my friend didn't get dizzy somehow even though he gets dizzy with other vr games. Idk what else to type I lwk might be going crazy. But good game. :P

reviews.review_title: Feel different but still VTOL VR style
reviews.review_description:
From a player’s point of view, Virtual Fighter Maneuvers feels like the moment VR air combat finally leans fully into what VR does best: close-range, high-intensity dogfighting.

The first thing that hits you is how personal every fight feels. This isn’t about long BVR setups or waiting for radar cues — most engagements quickly turn into visual merges, hard turns, and constant decision-making. In VR, that means you’re physically looking over your shoulder, tracking bandits with your own head movement, judging closure rate and angles by feel rather than HUD numbers. It’s incredibly immersive.

What really stands out is the flight model and energy management. You can’t just yank the stick endlessly without consequences. Pull too hard and you bleed speed fast; manage your energy well and you’re rewarded with positional advantage. Vertical maneuvers, scissors, and rate vs radius choices all matter, which makes every win feel earned rather than scripted.

Each aircraft has a clear personality. You immediately feel the difference between jets. This variety keeps the gameplay fresh and pushes you to adapt your tactics instead of flying everything the same way.

Multiplayer dogfights are where the game truly shines. Fights are fast, intense, and unforgiving. A single mistake — an over-commit, a bad pull, losing sight for half a second — can cost you the fight. At the same time, when you successfully out-rate an opponent, force an overshoot, or line up a clean shot after a scissors, the satisfaction is huge. Few VR games deliver that kind of adrenaline consistently.

Another strong point is how approachable yet deep the game feels. New players can jump in and have fun almost immediately, but experienced pilots will quickly notice there’s a high skill ceiling. Mastery comes from understanding angles, timing, and energy — not just reflexes.

Overall, Virtual Fighter Maneuvers feels like a love letter to classic dogfighting, rebuilt specifically for VR. It strips away distractions and focuses on what makes aerial combat thrilling: situational awareness, maneuvering skill, and decisive moments at knife-fight range. For anyone who enjoys VTOL VR or is passionate about close-range air combat, this game feels less like a side mode and more like a purpose-built experience that truly belongs in VR.

reviews.review_title: Genuinely one of the best games on my vr
reviews.review_description: This game IS SO GOOD it has (somewhat) realistic physics you can pass out if you put to many g forces on yourself you can defend missiles by flares the community is GREAT it is so good almost never gets salty you can get a tutorial from anyone you ask its SO GOOD 10000000000000000000/10

I love the game but one thing I would like added is that when you get hit you don’t spectate other players until your plane has hit the floor.   Because at the moment when you die it puts you in spectator straight away and I personally would like a setting so you don’t go into spectator until your plane hits the floor

This game is amazing. The way it’s presented with those graphics gives it a good first look. All the jets have there own purposes and strengths which can determine the outcome of fights. It’s not easy either, it’s not a quick learn to win fights. Mastering this would be hard.  Only thing we need are more jets, which I believe will eventually come out. One of my only problems is with turning in combat. Tight turns decrease speed greatly. With low speed if you are turning just a little with afterburners on you still don’t gain speed. This could probably be fixed though . Another problem is sometimes bot pull off some impossible moves. I think bots shouldn’t be able to know exactly where you are at every moment, but overall the bots aren’t that hard and can teach people how to fight.   Great game!!!

I’ve been waiting for a game like this to come natively to quest for a long time and it did not disappoint. Small suggestion for the devs: As of now, once you die your coms go out and you cannot communicate to your teammate. I think it would be awesome if you become a backseater for your teammate when you die so you can give them callouts. ￼

This is a very solid fighter pilot combat sim with realistic gameplay and well-executed flight mechanics.

That said, I was disappointed to learn that an internet connection is required to launch the game. I brought my Meta Quest 3 to a cottage hoping to demonstrate it, only to find that the game needed to check in online first. I'm assume this is related to DRM or license verification? Cottage had no wifi.
This was made slightly more confusing by the Meta store listing, which states “internet connection not required,” in this games Info section.

While this isn’t a deal-breaker for everyone, it does raise some questions about long-term accessibility and ownership. If the game relies on online verification, it’s reasonable for players to wonder how it would be affected if servers were ever taken offline.

Is there currently a way to play the game fully offline after purchase? And is this online check something the developers plan to revisit in the future, or is it a permanent design choice?

Despite this, the game itself is good. The bots are way too challenging for me but maybe i need more practice. Ill still keep playing it.  I recommend this to flight-sim fans—especially those who don’t mind an online check at launch.

Just something potential buyers may want to be aware of.

Suggestions: 
1)Option to adjust bot difficulty.
2)Option to eject when jet is hit would be that much more immersive. Maybe even add some type of reward if done on time. 

Cheers.
